description:
672 likes, 1 comments - coachcraigkolek on March 17, 2026: "Here’s what nobody talks about

Coaches don’t need a full match to judge your athlete —
they only need 5 minutes. ⏱️🔥

And in those 5 minutes, they’re scanning for:
💪 Confidence
🧠 Composure
🙌 Coachability
—not just talent.

If your athlete keeps reacting instead of competing, they’re being overlooked for reasons that have nothing to do with skill. The good news? These habits can be trained FAST. ⚡️

👉 Tap my Stan Store in bio to help your athlete build the confidence and composure coaches notice instantly. Your kid can stand out on purpose — not by accident.

#AthleteMindset #sportsparents #YouthSportsParenting".
